covenants.name: Maximum total net leverage
covenants.threshold: 4.25x at close; 4.00x from Q4 2026; 3.75x from Q4 2027; 3.50x from Q4 2028
covenants.verbatim_text: Maximum total net leverage — 4.25x at close; 4.00x from Q4 2026; 3.75x from Q4 2027; 3.50x from Q4 2028 — Quarterly — 3.51x — 3.44x / 3.93x

covenants.name: Minimum cash interest coverage
covenants.verbatim_text: Minimum cash interest coverage (Adj. EBITDA / cash interest) — 3.00x — Quarterly — 3.45x* — 3.39x / 2.97x

covenants.name: Minimum liquidity
covenants.threshold: $30.0M at all times
covenants.verbatim_text: Minimum liquidity (unrestricted cash + undrawn RCF) — $30.0M at all times — Monthly certificate — $65.0M — $46.0M / $38.0M (Q3 trough)

covenants.name: Maximum capital expenditure
covenants.threshold: $38.0M per fiscal year; 50% unused carryforward
covenants.verbatim_text: Maximum capital expenditure — $38.0M per fiscal year; 50% unused carryforward — Annually — n/a — $40.0M (uses $2.0M FY25 carryforward)

covenants.name: Financial reporting
covenants.threshold: Audited annual financial statements within 90 days of fiscal year-end; unaudited quarterlies within 45 days; monthly liquidity certificate within 15 days; annual budget by January 31
covenants.verbatim_text: Financial reporting: audited annual financial statements within 90 days of fiscal year-end; unaudited quarterlies within 45 days; monthly liquidity certificate within 15 days; annual budget by January 31.

covenants.name: Compliance certificate
covenants.threshold: Quarterly officer's certificate with covenant calculations, signed by the CFO
covenants.verbatim_text: Compliance certificate: quarterly officer's certificate with covenant calculations, signed by the CFO.

covenants.name: Negative pledge
covenants.threshold: No liens on any assets other than permitted liens (finance leases up to $25M, ordinary-course liens)
covenants.verbatim_text: Negative pledge: no liens on any assets other than permitted liens (finance leases up to $25M, ordinary-course liens).

covenants.name: Limitation on indebtedness
covenants.threshold: No additional funded debt other than an incremental facility up to $50M, subject to 3.75x pro forma net leverage and 50 bps MFN
covenants.verbatim_text: Limitation on indebtedness: no additional funded debt other than an incremental facility up to $50M, subject to 3.75x pro forma net leverage and 50 bps MFN.

covenants.name: Restricted payments
covenants.threshold: Dividends and distributions limited to a $15M fixed basket plus a builder basket (50% of cumulative net income), available only if pro forma net leverage ≤ 3.00x and no default
covenants.verbatim_text: Restricted payments: dividends and distributions limited to a $15M fixed basket plus a builder basket (50% of cumulative net income), available only if pro forma net leverage ≤ 3.00x and no default.

covenants.name: Asset sales / mandatory prepayment
covenants.threshold: Proceeds above $5M per year applied to mandatory prepayment unless reinvested within 12 months
covenants.verbatim_text: Asset sales: proceeds above $5M per year applied to mandatory prepayment unless reinvested within 12 months.

covenants.name: Excess cash flow sweep
covenants.threshold: 50% of excess cash flow, stepping to 25% at ≤ 3.00x net leverage and 0% at ≤ 2.50x
covenants.verbatim_text: Excess cash flow sweep: 50% of excess cash flow, stepping to 25% at ≤ 3.00x net leverage and 0% at ≤ 2.50x.

covenants.name: Change of control
covenants.threshold: Keller family plus Halcyon ceasing to hold ≥ 50.1% voting control constitutes an event of default
covenants.verbatim_text: Change of control: Keller family plus Halcyon ceasing to hold ≥ 50.1% voting control constitutes an event of default.

covenants.name: Permitted acquisitions
covenants.threshold: Individual transactions ≤ $50M and cumulative ≤ $120M over the facility life, subject to pro forma covenant compliance and no default
covenants.verbatim_text: Permitted acquisitions: individual transactions ≤ $50M and cumulative ≤ $120M over the facility life, subject to pro forma covenant compliance and no default.

covenants.name: Affiliate transactions
covenants.threshold: Arm's-length terms; transactions above $2M require independent-director approval
covenants.verbatim_text: Affiliate transactions: arm's-length terms; transactions above $2M require independent-director approval.

covenants.name: Sanctions / anti-corruption / AML
covenants.threshold: Customary representations and ongoing compliance undertakings (OFAC, FCPA)
covenants.verbatim_text: Sanctions / anti-corruption / AML: customary representations and ongoing compliance undertakings (OFAC, FCPA).

covenants.name: Insurance and ERISA
covenants.threshold: Maintenance of customary property, casualty and business-interruption insurance with lender as loss payee; no ERISA reportable events
covenants.verbatim_text: Insurance and ERISA: maintenance of customary property, casualty and business-interruption insurance with lender as loss payee; no ERISA reportable events.

covenants.name: Interest-rate hedging condition
covenants.threshold: Interest-rate hedging covering at least 50% of Term Loan B notional for a minimum of three years, executed within 90 days of close
covenants.verbatim_text: Interest-rate hedging covering at least 50% of Term Loan B notional for a minimum of three years, executed within 90 days of close.

covenants.name: Opening net leverage condition precedent
covenants.threshold: Pro forma compliance certificate demonstrating opening net leverage no greater than 3.75x
covenants.verbatim_text: Pro forma compliance certificate demonstrating opening net leverage no greater than 3.75x.

covenants.name: KYC/AML for all obligors (condition precedent)
covenants.threshold: Completed KYC/AML for all obligors
covenants.verbatim_text: Insurance certificates naming the Agent as loss payee; completed KYC/AML for all obligors.

covenants.name: Quarterly synergy-realization reporting (ongoing condition)
covenants.threshold: Quarterly synergy-realization reporting until the full $9.0M run-rate is achieved
covenants.verbatim_text: (i) quarterly synergy-realization reporting until the full $9.0M run-rate is achieved

covenants.name: Monthly liquidity certificates during Q3 seasonal period (ongoing condition)
covenants.threshold: Monthly liquidity certificates during each Q3 seasonal period
covenants.verbatim_text: (ii) monthly liquidity certificates during each Q3 seasonal period

covenants.name: No waiver of Q4 2026 leverage step-down without full committee review (ongoing condition)
covenants.threshold: No waiver of the Q4 2026 leverage step-down without full committee review
covenants.verbatim_text: (iii) no waiver of the Q4 2026 leverage step-down without full committee review.

covenants.name: Quality-of-earnings report on Apex (condition precedent)
covenants.threshold: Quality-of-earnings report on Apex supporting at least $7.5M of the $9.0M identified synergies
covenants.verbatim_text: Quality-of-earnings report on Apex supporting at least $7.5M of the $9.0M identified synergies.

covenants.name: EBITDA synergy add-back cap
covenants.threshold: Synergy add-backs capped at 20% of Adjusted EBITDA, subject to due-diligence support
covenants.verbatim_text: EBITDA definition permits synergy add-backs capped at 20% of Adjusted EBITDA, subject to due-diligence support.

top_risks.reasoning: This is the only covenant in the entire package that the memo explicitly projects to BREACH under the downside scenario (2.97x vs. 3.00x minimum), making it the highest-probability trip. Critically, the breach is driven by two simultaneously plausible events — synergy slippage and a resin cost spike — both of which are recurring operational risks for this business, not tail events; and because the covenant is tested quarterly on a trailing EBITDA basis, a breach cannot be cured quickly by operational improvement alone, requiring an equity injection or waiver negotiation.
top_risks.evidence_from_memo: Cash interest coverage — 3.39x / 2.97x ... Min 3.00x — BREACH ... the downside case produces a projected breach of the interest coverage covenant

top_risks.reasoning: The covenant steps down to 4.00x at Q4 2026 — precisely during the 18-month synergy-realization window when EBITDA is most execution-dependent — leaving only 0.07x of headroom in the downside case; this is far below the 0.25x threshold for thin cushion and subsequent step-downs to 3.75x (Q4 2027) and 3.50x (Q4 2028) create a sustained multi-year tightening gauntlet coinciding with integration risk. While an equity cure right exists (two uses, non-consecutive), using it consumes a scarce and non-replenishable remedy, making repeated near-misses very difficult to manage.
top_risks.evidence_from_memo: Net leverage at Q4 2026 test — 3.44x — 3.93x — Max 4.00x (step-down) ... the downside case leaves only 0.07x of headroom under the leverage covenant at the Q4 2026 step-down ... The 4.00x leverage step-down (Q4 2026) lands while synergies are mid-realization; downside case leaves 0.07x headroom.

top_risks.reasoning: Unlike cov_01 and cov_02, which are quarterly-tested, the minimum liquidity covenant is tested monthly, meaning seasonal Q3 pressure produces up to three consecutive test dates where the cushion compresses to just $8M above the $30M floor in the downside case ($38M vs. $30M); the monthly cadence of the certificate also means there is almost no reaction time between breach detection and a formal default, and the Q3 working-capital driver (resin pre-buy + beverage season) is a recurring, predictable stress that management cannot easily eliminate.
top_risks.evidence_from_memo: Liquidity at Q3 trough — 46.0 — 38.0 — Min $30.0M ... Q3 working-capital build (resin pre-buy + beverage season) draws liquidity to $38M in the downside case vs. $30M minimum ... reduces the liquidity cushion at the seasonal trough to $8M above the minimum.
